mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month change in FEDFUNDS tightens financial conditions and raises the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 2.56 for 2022-09-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month FEDFUNDS changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is above target and FEDFUNDS is rising, markets price a longer tightening cycle, so valuation multiples compress and S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year change crosses above 6% while FEDFUNDS 3-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value was 296.761 for 2022-09-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered interaction has a nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 forward return or a hit rate below 50% for negative returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals deteriorating labor income and rising recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.5 for 2022-09-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE 3-month increases above 0.3 percentage points are not followed by below-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS growth falls below CPIAUCSL growth, real retail demand is contracting despite higher nominal sales, pressuring revenues and margins and producing negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth crosses below CPIAUCSL 3-month growth
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 683974.0 for 2022-09-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered real-retail-sales weakness produces average 20-day S&P 500 returns equal to or above the unconditional sample average.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals improving production volumes and operating leverage, raising near-term earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value was 104.5464 for 2022-08-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a 60-day forward return hit rate below the unconditional positive-return frequency in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: A steep decline in HOUST during a rising FEDFUNDS environment signals that rate-sensitive demand is contracting, lowering future construction activity and credit demand, so 60-day S&P 500 returns are negative.
candidate_trigger: HOUST year-over-year growth crosses below -15% and FEDFUNDS 6-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1575.0 for 2022-08-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the HOUST-FEDFUNDS trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth is strong, UNRATE is below 4%, and CPIAUCSL inflation is high, labor strength reinforces restrictive policy expectations, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE below 4% and PAYEMS 3-month change > 500 thousand while CPIAUCSL year-over-year change > 5%
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 153018.0 and UNRATE was 3.5 for 2022-09-01 at the decision date
regime_hint: tight labor market with above-target inflation
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not show a negative average 5-day S&P 500 forward return or if the negative-return hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth turns negative while FEDFUNDS is rising, aggregate demand is weakening into tighter policy, reducing earnings expectations and producing negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 2-quarter growth crosses below 0 while FEDFUNDS 6-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest vintage available in the snapshot was dated 2022-04-01
regime_hint: policy tightening into slowing real activity
failure_condition: Reject if triggered GDPC1-FEDFUNDS observations have 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional median in more than half of walk-forward cases.
